name: Swift Blink
description: A cunning blade able to anticipate and enable its bearer's movements.

abilities.name: Swift Blink
abilities.description: Instantly teleports the wielder towards the targeted point. Cooldown: 15. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: Global. Max Blink Distance: 1200. Move Speed Bonus: 40%. Agility Bonus: 35. After the teleportation, grants the caster phased movement, increased movement speed, and bonus agility for a while.
